faqs.answer: Call us at (845) 555-0180 and our team will verify your benefits before your visit. You can also bring your insurance card to your appointment.
faqs.question: How do I know if my insurance is accepted?

faqs.answer: We offer our Alex Wellness Plan — a membership plan that covers preventive care and provides discounts on all other services. We also offer CareCredit, LendingClub, and Sunbit financing.
faqs.question: What if I don't have dental insurance?

faqs.answer: Yes! Through CareCredit, LendingClub, and Sunbit, we offer monthly payment plans with promotional 0% interest periods. Apply in our office in just minutes.
faqs.question: Do you offer payment plans?

faqs.answer: Most plans cover preventive care (cleanings, exams) at 100%, basic procedures (fillings) at 80%, and major procedures (crowns, implants) at 50%. Annual maximums vary by plan.
faqs.question: What does dental insurance typically cover?

hero.title: We Make Dental Care Affordable
hero.subtitle: Insurance accepted, financing available, and a membership plan for those without coverage

networkInfo.body: We are in-network with most major PPO dental plans, which means you'll receive the maximum insurance benefit when you visit us. If you have an out-of-network plan, we can still see you — your insurance will cover a portion of the cost, and we'll help you understand your benefits before treatment.
networkInfo.title: In-Network vs. Out-of-Network

howInsuranceWorks.body:
Dental insurance is different from medical insurance. Most plans cover preventive care (cleanings, exams, X-rays) at 100%. Basic procedures like fillings are typically covered at 80%, and major procedures like crowns and implants at 50%. Most plans have an annual maximum of $1,000-$2,000.

We verify your benefits before treatment so you know exactly what your out-of-pocket cost will be. No surprises.
howInsuranceWorks.title: How Dental Insurance Works
